channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Adventure mystery game Lost & Found announced for PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Hybrid animation style blends 2D, 3D, pixel art, and more.

ShaggyBearGames has announced Lost & Found, an adventure mystery game about returning lost belongings and uncovering the personal stories behind each item. It will be available for PC via Steam. A release date was not announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

Lost & Found is an adventure mystery game where you return townsfolk’s lost belongings and uncover personal stories behind each item. It features a hybrid animation style that blends 2D, 3D, pixel art, and more. Gather clues, investigate locals, and ensure every lost belonging ends up in the right hands.

Return to a Small Rural Town You Once Called Home

It’s 2007. You’re Rico, a laid-off artist struggling to find new opportunities in the city, and you decide to return to your hometown to work at the only place offering you a job: the local Lost and Found office.

A lot has changed since the last time you were in your hometown, Luisiana. Many friends moved abroad to seek better opportunities, businesses are closing, and the hangout spots you used to love are now run down. Explore what’s left of your hometown and reconnect with the folks you left behind.

  • ❮
  • ❯

Explore, Find an Owner of a Lost Belonging, Return Item, Repeat

A simple job on the surface, but not everyone would tell you the truth. Some would claim items that are not theirs. Gather and find whatever you can to find out who’s lying and who’s telling the truth. BUT be careful, not all that’s lost is meant to be found.

Everyone Has a Story to Tell

That’s one of the game’s guiding philosophies, and it’s why the art direction uses mixed media (2D, 3D, pixel art, claymation-like, and more). Each character is purposely designed to look and feel unique, like each of them has a story to tell. Also, listen closely; every townsfolk you’ll meet carries memories, gossip, secrets, surprises and even lies. Information you might find valuable down the line.

Every Item You Return Matters

From a decade-old wallet to an old notebook that holds a legendary bread recipe, each item contains a piece of someone’s life. Returning them to the right hands may uncover stories and change a life for the better, but giving them to the wrong individual may lead to unexpected consequences that affect the story of the game.

Key Features

  • Explore the small rural town of Luisiana.
  • Return lost belongings.
  • Discover the stories of those belongings and their owners along the way.
  • Make sure to return the belongings to the right owners. Not everyone will tell you the truth.
  • Every returned item moves the story forward. Returning an item to the wrong person affects the story.
  • Choose who to befriend and who not to trust among hundreds of unique characters.

Watch the announcement trailer below. View the first screenshots at the gallery.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/adventure-mystery-game-lost-found-announced-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Final Fantasy IX animated series Final Fantasy: Black Mages Legacy now in production
item.content:encoded:
• Anime

First season consists of 10 episodes, each 22 minutes in length.

The first season of the Final Fantasy IX animated series first announced back in 2021 is officially in production at EuroVisual, the studio’s official website has revealed. It is titled Final Fantasy: Black Mages Legacy and will consist of 10 episodes, each 22 minutes in length.

Here is the description listed on the website:

Final Fantasy: Black Mages Legacy

Season 1 / In Production / 2D / 10 Episodes / 22 minutes

Imel, Koln, Luciola, Thea, Fala and Doc, children of the hero Bibi, are the last dark mages of the four continents. Today, they live happily in the city of Alexandria, guarded by its inhabitants who are rather friendly, although sometimes very curious. Unfortunately, this peaceful existence was not meant to last… One day, Koln discovers Mel, frozen like a statue, in the inn where he works. Could it be the tragic legacy of their father catching up with them?

Thanks, RPG Site.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/final-fantasy-ix-animated-series-final-fantasy-black-mages-legacy-now-in-production
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Cozy adventure game Duck Side of the Moon launches May 7 for Switch, PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • Switch

Explore every corner of the galaxy.

Cozy adventure game Duck Side of the Moon will launch for Switch and PC via Steam on May 7, developer Starbrew Games announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

Embark on a cozy quest as a duck in space! Take your time to make new friends and explore this strange side of the galactic pond. Mine materials to craft items and improve your spaceship in this relaxing adventure.

After your space mission takes a wrong turn, you find yourself crashed on a planetoid with nothing but rocks. Fortunately for you, the rocks can talk, walk—and boogie?!

Turns out these rocks are disco-loving Geodes who live to party! But when their party gets crashed just as hard as your spaceship, it’s up to you to bring back the groove.

Teach these pebbles how to party again and they might just have what it takes to get your ship back among the stars.

Key Features

  • Meet and Help
    • Meet and help new friends! Start a party, deliver mail, help clean up—there’s plenty of ways you can lend a hand (or wing) on this side of the galaxy.
    • The locals’ lives may look solid, but problems still slip through the cracks. Your aid is sure to be met with plenty of granite-tude!
  • Collect and Craft
    • Collect and craft gadgets! Use your skills as a savvy explorer and the resources of this strange world to expand your toolkit and wardrobe.
    • Find recipes and resources to upgrade your gear and unlock new ways to mine, move, and groove—and look good doing it!
  • Explore and Discover
    • Explore until you can no more! See what’s behind every corner of this world, take your time to uncover its secrets and enjoy the sights.
    • Whether you want to leave no stone unturned or you’d rather gaze up at the stars for a while, the galaxy is yours to enjoy at your own pace. Your spaceship isn’t going anywhere without you!

Watch a new trailer below.

Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/cozy-adventure-game-duck-side-of-the-moon-launches-may-7-for-switch-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
